LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF KEVIN CAVANAUGH'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND REVOKE DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT DUE TO DEFENDANTS' FAILURE TO SERVE THE DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS PRODUCED SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO CREATE A PRESUMPTION THAT THEIR DEMURRER WAS TIMELY SERVED ON APRIL 1, 2014 AND PLAINTIFF FAILED TO REBUT THAT PRESUMPTION. (FORSLUND V. FORSLUND (1964) 225 CAL.APP.2D 476, 486.). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR # 5976 (302)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-24-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Set Aside And Revoke Demurrer To Second Amended Comlaint
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF KEVIN CAVANAUGH's Motion To Set Aside And Revoke Demurrer To Second Amended Complaint due to Defendants' failure to serve the demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is denied. Defendants produced sufficient evidence to create a presumption that their Demurrer was timely served on April 1, 2014 and Plaintiff failed to rebut that presumption. (Forslund v. Forslund (1964) 225 Cal.App.2d 476, 486.). ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: KEVIN KAVANAUGH, PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs BRYAN KEMNITZER and KEMNITZER, BARRON AND KRIEG, LLP's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. The Court will sign order submitted via email before today's hearing. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
